title: Horizontal Scroll Bar
text: Horizontal Scroll Bar This property determines whether a horizontal scroll bar is displayed for this widget. True or False (default). Picture widget only: HScroll = True | False Edit Box For the EditBox widget, a scroll bar can only be used if the Multiline property is True . The Dynamic property determines whether scroll bars are always visible, or only when the field has focus. Example: Setting in ProcScript This property can only be set in ProcScript for the Picture widget. $fieldproperties(PICTURE) = "HScroll=true" Copy Applies To EditBox Image Name urtfeditbox (RichEditBox) Related Links Multiline This property determines whether the data in the widget is displayed on more than one line, and whether carriage returns can be used when entering data. Dynamic Determines how the widget is displayed if the field does not have focus. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
